title: GEAR AID Suede Nubuck Fabric Shoe Care Kit Waterproof breathable Footwear 2-Pack
description:
The Revivex Suede, Nubuck and Fabric Boot and Shoe Care Kit is all you need to clean and protect suede, nubuck, canvas and waterproof-breathable shoes including GORE-TEX® boots. The complete Deluxe Kit includes suede cleaner, a water protectant repellent spray, a stiff brush to remove dirt, and an eraser block to remove scuffs. The Revivex cleaner creates minimal suds, while the water repellent keeps your shoes protected from getting soaked and stained. If you already purchased our Deluxe Kit, refill it with the Revivex cleaner and water repellent. PFAS-free with zero fluorocarbons, this formula is ideal for use on waterproof-breathable footwear fabrics. Extending the life of your favorite kicks is easier than ever with the Revivex Suede, Nubuck and Fabric Boot Care Kit.

GEAR AID Suede Nubuck Fabric Shoe Care Kit Waterproof breathable Footwear 2-Pack

The Revivex Suede, Nubuck and Fabric Boot and Shoe Care Kit is all you need to clean and protect suede, nubuck, canvas and waterproof-breathable shoes including GORE-TEX® boots. The complete Deluxe Kit includes suede cleaner, a water protectant repellent spray, a stiff brush to remove dirt, and an eraser block to remove scuffs. The Revivex cleaner creates minimal suds, while the water repellent keeps your shoes protected from getting soaked and stained. If you already purchased our Deluxe Kit, refill it with the Revivex cleaner and water repellent. PFAS-free with zero fluorocarbons, this formula is ideal for use on waterproof-breathable footwear fabrics. Extending the life of your favorite kicks is easier than ever with the Revivex Suede, Nubuck and Fabric Boot Care Kit.

Key Features

  • Clean and apply this suede protector spray on suede, nubuck, and fabric boots and shoes; keep footwear looking like new with the Revivex Suede and Fabric Boot Care Kit
  • PFAS-free with zero fluorocarbons, this formula is ideal for use on waterproof-breathable fabrics
  • Use the concentrated Revivex Boot and Shoe Cleaner to safely remove dirt and grime from suede, nubuck, canvas and GORE-TEX boots
  • Maximize breathability of waterproof-breathable shoes and keep feet feeling cool and dry with Revivex Suede and Fabric Water Repellant
  • Packaging may vary
